title: Botox or Dermal Filler best for downturned mouth？

excerpt: Cherie blair has something similar but it's more of her depressor labiai so how would you diagnose whether or not they need botox or fillers so you're looking for a hypodynamic element so during expressing if you see someone who's kind of pulling down i think like robert de niro …

segments.text: cherie blair has something similar but it's more of her depressor labiai so how would you diagnose whether or not they need botox or fillers so you're looking for a hypodynamic element so during expressing if you see someone who's kind of pulling down i think like robert de niro is a bit like this he's got that slight downward pull obviously he's getting on a bit so some of its age but there's a definite hypertonic component to what pull them down cherie blair has something similar but it's more of her depressor labiai so that pulls this more um directly inferior down rather than down and lateral um so just start to look at people's faces and see what they're like during movement and you're just aiming to add a bit of harmony to the right people and it's a small dose and um but i wouldn't necessarily use it to treat everyone who has a down-to-mouth because a lot of them it's fat loss and it's aging and you might want to be thinking more holistically with dermal fillers as well as your other treatment options including toxin

transcript: cherie blair has something similar but it's more of her depressor labiai so how would you diagnose whether or not they need botox or fillers so you're looking for a hypodynamic element so during expressing if you see someone who's kind of pulling down i think like robert de niro is a bit like this he's got that slight downward pull obviously he's getting on a bit so some of its age but there's a definite hypertonic component to what pull them down cherie blair has something similar but it's more of her depressor labiai so that pulls this more um directly inferior down rather than down and lateral um so just start to look at people's faces and see what they're like during movement and you're just aiming to add a bit of harmony to the right people and it's a small dose and um but i wouldn't necessarily use it to treat everyone who has a down-to-mouth because a lot of them it's fat loss and it's aging and you might want to be thinking more holistically with dermal fillers as well as your other treatment options including toxin
